title: Warehouse Executive (Tuas)
description:
• Supervise and lead a team of customer service staff to ensure timely and accurate fulfillment of customer orders.
  • Communicate with customers via email and phone regarding documentation, administrative tasks, and to resolve any issues.
  • Oversee shipment clearance and delivery processes to ensure timely execution.
  • Monitor operational activities to ensure key performance indicators (KPIs) are consistently met.
  • Prepare and issue customer billing invoices promptly and accurately.
  • Compile and analyze data using Microsoft Office tools for reporting purposes.
  • Promote a culture of physical and mental well-being within the workplace.
  • Take ownership of section safety and communicate safety-related information to team members.
  • Perform additional tasks and responsibilities as assigned by superiors.
  • Conduct regular stock audits and cycle counts to maintain inventory accuracy.
  • Identify opportunities for process improvement and implement changes to enhance operational efficiency.
  • Develop, implement, and enforce standard operating procedures (SOPs).
  • Encourage a positive, collaborative, and high-performing team environment.
  • Coordinate with cross-functional teams including procurement, sales, and customer service to ensure smooth operations.
  • Implement corrective actions to address and resolve performance-related issues.

Requirements

  • Preferable Diploma or Degree in Logistics, Supply Chain, or related field
  • 3–5 years of relevant experience will be added advantages
  • Familiarity with logistics operations, documentation, and safety procedures

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.

postedCompany.description:
Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
